property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

testcase.name: rejects_negative_age

error.message:
Mockito cannot mock this class: class com.mycompany.hms.dao.PatientDao.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 26 JVM vendor name : Oracle Corporation JVM vendor version : 26+35-2893 JVM name : Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 26+35-2893 JVM info : mixed mode, sharing OS name : Windows 11 OS version : 10.0
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.
Underlying exception : org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Could not modify all classes [class com.mycompany.hms.dao.PatientDao, class java.lang.Object]

testcase.error:
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException:
Mockito cannot mock this class: class com.mycompany.hms.dao.PatientDao.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
Java : 26 JVM vendor name : Oracle Corporation JVM vendor version : 26+35-2893 JVM name : Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM JVM version : 26+35-2893 JVM info : mixed mode, sharing OS name : Windows 11 OS version : 10.0
You are seeing this disclaimer because Mockito is configured to create inlined mocks. You can learn about inline mocks and their limitations under item #39 of the Mockito class javadoc.

This problem should never occur for javac-compiled classes. This problem has been observed for classes that are: - Compiled by older versions of scalac - Classes that are part of the Android distribution at org.mockito.internal.creation.bytebuddy.InlineBytecodeGenerator.mockClass(InlineBytecodeGenerator.java:218) at org.mockito.internal.configuration.MockAnnotationProcessor.process(MockAnnotationProcessor.java:25) at org.mockito.internal.configuration.IndependentAnnotationEngine.process(IndependentAnnotationEngine.java:72) at testcase.name: inserts_when_valid

error.message:
Mockito cannot mock this class: class com.mycompany.hms.dao.PatientDao.
If you're not sure why you're getting this error, please open an issue on GitHub.
